                                                        </body>
                                                    </body>
                                                    <body name="gripper0_rightfinger" pos="0 0 0.0524" quat="0.707107 0 0 0.707107">
                                                        <inertial pos="0 0 0.05" mass="0.1" diaginertia="0.01 0.01 0.005"/>
                                                        <joint name="gripper0_finger_joint2" pos="0 0 0" axis="0 1 0" type="slide" limited="true" range="-0.04 0" armature="1" damping="100" frictionloss="1"/>

                                                    </body>
                                                </body>
                                            </body>

                        </body>
                    </body>
                </body>
            </body>

        <general name="robot0_torq_j1" joint="robot0_joint1" ctrllimited="true" ctrlrange="-80 80"/>

        <general name="gripper0_gripper_finger_joint2" joint="gripper0_finger_joint2" ctrllimited="true" forcelimited="true" ctrlrange="-0.04 0" forcerange="-20 20" biastype="affine" gainprm="1000 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0" biasprm="0 -1000 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0"/>
